description.en: Size of the initial probe table, as a power of two. The resulting memory usage is 1 << (hash_log+2) bytes. Larger tables improve compression ratio of strategies <= dfast, and improve compression speed of strategies > dfast. A value of zero causes the value to be selected automatically.
